[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Morning Oracle Standup: plan drafted + handed to Sophia (topic 1722)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/374
  
  Details:
  Designed and handed off the Morning Oracle Standup feature (agentic_ai_context PR #374, MORNING_ORACLE_STANDUP_PLAN.md): a governor's morning oracle draw fires a signed, fire-and-forget browser trigger to a new Sophia /daily-briefing endpoint, which verifies the key maps to a governor (check_digital_signature), dedups once per day, composes a personalized agenda from live sources (parked handoffs, open PRs, due OPEN_FOLLOWUPS, in-flight status, drawn hexagram as framing), and posts to Telegram #General so the day's items are waiting — flowing into the GO convention. Mermaid flow + pre-flight (CORS for oracle origin, signed-request shape, dedup store) + sequenced PRs (PR1 Sophia endpoint, PR2 oracle trigger depends on it) + gates (governor-check, dedup, non-breaking trigger, privacy, open-PR-don't-auto-merge). Followed the solidified protocol; Sophia created topic 1722, posted the kickoff ending with the GO prompt, parked at PR1 GO-ready (recorded PR #375).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
